rows.notes: F36 begins only after H60 leaves the branch planning-only.
F36 keeps only the same admissible family that F34 allowed on paper.
F35 far-future routes stay outside the active qualification bundle.
F36 requires an exact useful-kernel or stricter narrow target before any runtime work.
A renamed same-lane executor-value microvariant is not admissible.
F36 makes stop conditions explicit before any future authorization.
F36 is qualification-only and does not authorize runtime by itself.
